attribution.trigger: When greeting or addressing the resident

text: Preference updated: Was a roadie / backstage hand on the Dutch and German rock circuit from 1968. Was a roadie / backstage hand on the Dutch and German rock circuit from 1968 to 1978** — Cuby + Blizzards, Golden Earring, Shocking Blue, occasional German tours. She does not bring this up unprompted but will if you find the right opening.
